L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 826] ubZ fnYyh] cq/okj] uoEcj 30] 2016@vxzgk;.k 9] 1938 No. 826] NEW DELHI, WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 30, 2016/AGRAHAYANA 9, 1938 काᳶमक, लोक िशकायत तथा पᱶ शन मंᮢ ालय (काᳶमक और ᮧिशᭃण िवभाग) अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 30 नव᭥बर, 2016 सा का.िन. 1104(अ).—भारतीय वन सेवा (संवगᭅ), िनयमावली, 1966 के िनयम 4 के उप-िनयम (1) और (2) के साथ पᳯठत, अिखल भारतीय सेवा अिधिनयम, 1951 (1951 का 61) कᳱ धारा 3 कᳱ उप धारा (1) ᳇ारा ᮧद᭜त शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, के᭠ ᮤ ीय सरकार, िᮢपुरा सरकार के परामशᭅ से भारतीय वन सेवा (संवगᭅ पद सं᭎या का िनयतन) िविनयमवली, 1966 मᱶ आगे और संशोधन करने के िलए एतद᳇ारा िन᭥निलिखत िविनयम बनाती है, अथाᭅत्: - 1. (i) इन िविनयमᲂ को भारतीय वन सेवा (संवगᭅ पद सं᭎ या का िनयतन) तृतीय संशोधन िविनयमावली, 2016 कहा जाएगा। (ii) ये िविनयम शासकᳱय राजपᮢ मᱶ इनके ᮧकाशन कᳱ तारीख को ᮧ वृत हᲂगे । 2. भारतीय वन सेवा (संवगᭅ पद सं᭎या का िनयतन) िविनयमावली, 1966 कᳱ अनुसूची मᱶ िᮢ पु रा शीषᭅक और उसके अ᭠तगᭅत आने वाली ᮧिवि᳥यᲂ के ᭭ थान पर िन᭥निलिखत ᮧित᭭थािपत ᳰकया जाएग ा, अथाᭅत्:- “िᮢ पु रा रा᭔य सरकार के अधीन वᳯर᭬ ठ Ჽूटी पद 37 ᮧधान मु᭎य वन संरᭃक 1 अपर ᮧधान मु᭎य वन संरᭃक एवं सीड᭣᭨यूएलड᭣᭨यू (व᭠यजीव एवं पाᳯरि᭭थितकᳱय पयाᭅवरण) अपर ᮧधान मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (पᳯरयोजना िनमाᭅण, िनगरानी एवं मू᭨यांकन) 1 अपर ᮧधान मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (ᮧशासन एवं लोक संपकᭅ) 1 -- 1 of 10 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (योजना एवं िवकास) 1 मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (ड᭣᭨यूपी एवं सवᱷ) 1 मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (अनुसंधान एवं ᮧिशᭃण) 1 मु᭎य वन संरᭃक से अिधक नह ᱭ 07 3. रा᭔य ᮧितिनयुिᲦ ᳯरजवᭅ उपयुᭅ᭍त मद 1 के 25% से अिधक नहᱭ 09 4. ᮧिशᭃण ᳯरजवᭅ उपयुᭅ᭍त मद 1 के 3.5% से अिधक नहᱭ 01 5. छुᲵी ᳯरजवᭅ और किन᭬ठ पद ᳯरजवᭅ उपयुᭅ᭍त मद 1 के 16.5% से अिधक नहᱭ 06 6. भारतीय वन सेवा (भतᱮ) िनयमावली, 1966 के िनयम 8 के अ᭠तगᭅत पदो᭠नित ᳇ारा भरे जाने वाले पद उपयुᭅ᭍त मद 1,2,3 और 4 के 33 1/3 % से अिधक नहᱭ 18 -- 2 of 10 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 7. सेवा के िᮢपुर ा संवगᭅ कᳱ कुल ᮧािधकृत पद सं᭎ या 60 थी । ᳯट᭡पणी (2): ᮧधान िविनयम 31.10.1966 कᳱ अिधसूचना सं. 6/1/66-अ.भा.से.(IV) जी.एस.आर. 1072 ᳇ारा भारत के राजपᮢ मᱶ ᮧकािशत ᳰकए गए थे त᭜प᭫चात, भारतीय वन सेवा के िᮢपुरा संव गᭅ के संबंध मᱶ िन᭥निलिखत सा.का.िन. सं᭎याᲐ तथा ितिथयᲂ ᳇ारा उ᭠हᱶ संशोिधत ᳰकया गया था: - ᮓम स. सा.का.िन. ᮧकाशन कᳱ ितिथ 1 1673 30.10.66 2 17 7.1.67 3 653 6.5.67 4 654 6.5.67 5 689 12.08.2016 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th November, 2016 G.S.R. 1104 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 3 of the All India Service Act, 1951 (61 of 1951), read with sub-rules (1) and (2) of Rule 4 of Indian Forest Service (Cadre) Rules, 1966, the Central Government in consultation with the Government of Tripura hereby makes the following regulations further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, namely :- 1. (i) These regulations shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Third Amendment Regulations, 2016. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of Cadre Strength) Regulations, 1966, in the Schedule, for the heading "Tripura" and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely :- “TRIPURA SENIOR DUTY POSTS UNDER THE STATE GOVERNMENT 37 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & CWLW (Wildlife & Eco-Tourism) 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Project Formulation, Monitoring & Evaluation) 1 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Administration & Public Relations) 1 Chief Conservator of Forests (Planning & Development) 1 Chief Conservator of Forests (WP & Survey) 1 Chief Conservator of Forests (Research & Training) 1 Chief Conservator of Forests (Territorial) 1 Chief Conservator of Forests (Protection & Nodal Officer-FCA) 1 Chief Conservator of Forests (IT & Statistics) 1 Conservator of Forests (Wildlife & Eco-Tourism) 1 Conservator of Forests (Monitoring & Evaluation) 1 Conservator of Forests (Establishment & HRD) 1 Conservator of Forests (Project Formulation & EAP) 1 Conservator of Forests (Territorial Coordination ) 1 -- 5 of 10 -- 6 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Conservator of Forests (Vigilance & RTI) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Head Quarters) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (EAP) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Director of National Park) 2 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Forest Utilization) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Working Plan Division) 2 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Research Division) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Training Division) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Planning & Development) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Protection & FCA) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (IT & Statistics) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (District Forest Officer, North District) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (District Forest Officer, Dhalai District ) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (District Forest Officer, West District) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (District Forest Officer, South District) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Additional District Forest Officer, Dhalai District) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Additional District Forest Officer, North District) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Additional District Forest Officer, West District) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Additional District Forest Officer, South District) 1 Deputy Conservator of Forests (NTFP i/c Medicinal Plants) 1 1. Total Senior Duty Posts 37 2. Central Deputation Reserve not exceeding 20% of Item 1 above 07 3. State Deputation Reserve not exceeding 25% of Item 1 above 09 4. Training Reserve not exceeding 3.5% of Item 1 above 01 5. Leave Reserve and Junior Posts Reserve not exceeding 16.5% of Item 1 above 06 6. Posts to be filled by promotion under Rule 8 of the Indian Forest Service (Recruitment) Rules 1966 not exceeding 33 1/3 % of Item 1, 2, 3 and 4 above 18 7. Posts to be filled up by Direct Recruitment (Item 1+2+3+4+5-6) 42 Total Authorised Strength (Item 6+7 above) 60” [F. No.16016/03/2016 - AIS-II (A)] RAJESH KUMAR YADAV, Under Secy. Note-1: Prior to the issue of this Notification, the total Authorized Strength of the IFS cadre of Tripura was 60. Note-2: The Principal regulations were notified vide notification No.6/1/66-AIS (IV), dated 31-10-1966 vide G.S.R. No.1072 in the Indian Forest Service (Fixation of cadre strength) Regulations, 1966, and subsequently been amended, vide notifications given below:- Sl. के᭠ ᮤ सरकार िᮢपुरा सरकार से परामशᭅ करके भारतीय वन सेवा (वेतन) िनयमावली, 2016 मᱶ आगे और संशोधन करने के िलए एत᳏ारा िन᭥निलिखत िनयम बनाती है, अथाᭅत् :- 1. (i) इन िनयमᲂ को भारतीय वन सेवा (वेतन) ि᳇तीय संशोधन िनयमावली, 2016 कहा जाएगा । (ii) ये िनयम सरकारी राजपᮢ मᱶ उनके ᮧकाशन कᳱ तारीख से ᮧवृ᭜ त हᲂगे। 2. भारतीय वन सेवा (वेतन) िनयमावली, 2016 मᱶ :- (क) अनुसूची-II मᱶ रा᭔य सरकारᲂ के अंतगᭅत भारतीय वन सेवा के वᳯर᭬ठ वेत नमान से ऊपर के वेतन वाले पदᲂ मᱶ, तािलका मᱶ ᮧथम कॉलम मे आने वाली िᮢ पु रा ᮧिवि᳥ के िलए और दूसरे कॉलम मᱶ तदनुᱨपी ᮧिवि᳥यᲂ को िन᭥न िलिखत से ᮧित᭭थािपत ᳰकया जाएगा, अथाᭅत् :- “िᮢ पु रा 1. ᮧधान मु᭎य वन संरᭃक वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 17 2. अपर ᮧधान मु᭎य वन संरᭃक एवं सीड᭣᭨यूएलड᭣᭨यू (व᭠यजीव एवं पाᳯरि᭭थितकᳱय पयाᭅवरण) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 15 3. अपर ᮧधान मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (पᳯरयोजना िनमाᭅण, िनगरानी एवं मू᭨यांकन) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 15 4. अपर ᮧधान मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (ᮧशासन एवं लोक संपकᭅ) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 15 5. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (योजना एवं िवकास) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ त र 14 6. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (ड᭣᭨यूपी एवं सवᱷ) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ त र 14 7. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (अनुसंधान एवं ᮧिशᭃण) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ त र 14 8. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (ᭃेᮢीय) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ त र 14 9. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (सुरᭃा एवं नोडल अिधकारी-एफसीए) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ त र 14 10. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (आईटी एवं सांि᭎यकᳱय) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 14 11. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (व᭠यजीव एवं इको पयᭅटन) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 13ए -- 8 of 10 -- ¹Hkkx (पᳯरयोजना िनमाᭅण एवं ईएपी) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 13ए 15. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (ᭃेᮢीय सम᭠वय) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 13ए 16. मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (सतᭅकता एवं आरटीआई) वेतन मैᳯᮝ᭍स मᱶ ᭭ तर 13ए (ख) अनुसूची-II ख मᱶ, वेतन के अितᳯर᭍त िवशेष भᱫा लेने वाले पदᲂ सिहत रा᭔य सरकार के अधीन भारतीय वन सेवा के वᳯर᭬ठ वेतनमान मᱶ, वेतन लेने वाले पदᲂ से संबंिधत िᮢपुरा के ᮧिवि᭬ट के िलए िन᭥निलिखत ᮧित᭭थािपत ᳰकया जाएगा, अथाᭅत् :– 1. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (मु᭎यालय) 2. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (ईएपी) 3. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (िनदेशक, रा᭬ᮝीय उ᳒ान) 4. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (वन उपयोग) 5. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (कायᭅ योजना ᮧभाग) 6. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (अनुसंधान ᮧभाग) 7. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (िजला वन अिधकारी, धालाई िजला) 13. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (िजला वन अिधकारी, पि᭫ च म िजला) 14. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (िजला वन अिधकारी, दिᭃण िजला) 15. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (अपर िजला वन अिधकारी, धालाई िजला) 16. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (अपर िजला वन अिधकारी, उᱫरी िजला) 17. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (अपर िजला वन अिधकारी, पि᭫च म िजला) 18. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक (अपर िजला वन अिधकारी, दिᭃण िजला) 19. उप मु᭎य वन संरᭃक, (एनएफपी आई/सी औषधीय पौधे पेड़) [फा. सं. 16016/03/2016 -अ.भा.से.-II-(ख)] राजेश कुमार यादव, अवर सिचव ᳯट᭡पणी : ᮧधान िनयम भारत के असाधारण राजपᮢ मᱶ सा.का.िन. सं. 924 (अ) ᳰदनांक 28 िसत᭥बर, 2016 ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत ᳰकए गए थे। NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th November, 2016 G.S.R. 1105(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 3 of the All India Services Act, 1951 (61 of 1951) the Central Government, in consultation with the Government of Tripura hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Rules, 2016 namely:- 1. (i) These rules shall be called the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Second Amendment Rules, 2016. (ii) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette 2. In the Indian Forest Service (Pay) Rules, 2016:- -- 9 of 10 -- 10 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] (a) In Schedule II- A Posts carrying pay above the Time Scale in the Indian Forest Service under the State Governments, in the Table, for the entry “Tripura” appearing in the first column and the corresponding entry in the second column, the following shall be substituted, namely:— “TRIPURA 1 Principal Chief Conservator of Forests Level 17 in the Pay Matrix 2 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests & CWLW (Wildlife & Eco- Tourism) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix 3 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Project Formulation, Monitoring & Evaluation) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix 4 Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Administration & Public Relations) Level 15 in the Pay Matrix 5 Chief Conservator of Forests (Planning & Development) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 6 Chief Conservator of Forests (WP & Survey) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 7 Chief Conservator of Forests (Research & Training) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 8 Chief Conservator of Forests (Territorial) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 9 Chief Conservator of Forests (Protection & Nodal Officer-FCA) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 10 Chief Conservator of Forests (IT & Statistics) Level 14 in the Pay Matrix 11 Conservator of Forests (Wildlife & Eco-Tourism) Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 12 Conservator of Forests (Monitoring & Evaluation) Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 13 Conservator of Forests (Establishment & HRD) Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 14 Conservator of Forests (Project Formulation & EAP) Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 15 Conservator of Forests (Territorial Coordination ) Level 13A in the Pay Matrix 16 Conservator of Forests (Vigilance & RTI) Level 13A in the Pay Matrix” (b) In Schedule-II B, Posts carrying pay in the Senior Scale of the Indian Forest Service under the State Governments including posts carrying special pay in addition to pay in the Time Scale for the entry Tripura, the following shall be substituted, namely:— 1 “Deputy Conservator of Forests (Head Quarters) 2 Deputy Conservator of Forests (EAP) 3 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Director of National Park) 4 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Forest Utilization) 5 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Working Plan Division) 6 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Research Division) 7 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Training Division) 8 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Planning & Development) 9 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Protection & FCA) 10 Deputy Conservator of Forests (IT & Statistics) 11 Deputy Conservator of Forests (District Forest Officer, North District) 12 Deputy Conservator of Forests (District Forest Officer, Dhalai District ) 13 Deputy Conservator of Forests (District Forest Officer, West District) 14 Deputy Conservator of Forests (District Forest Officer, South District) 15 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Additional District Forest Officer, Dhalai District) 16 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Additional District Forest Officer, North District) 17 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Additional District Forest Officer, West District) 18 Deputy Conservator of Forests (Additional District Forest Officer, South District) 19 Deputy Conservator of Forests (NTFP i/c Medicinal Plants)” [F. No.16016/03/2016 - AIS-II (B)] RAJESH KUMAR YADAV, Under Secy. Note: The Principal Rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, vide number G.S.R. 924(E) dated the 28th September, 2016 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 10 of 10 --
